rag_rules: Use assign statements in implementation scope only for output features or declared auxiliary variables
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they describe structural or behavioral relationships
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component declaration
Only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax as defined in the AGREE annex
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
